title: Better Elytra+
description: Changes the default Elytra to a more refined, vanilla-friendly texture.
body:
# **<u>Better Elytra +</u>**

Better Elytra is a lightweight Minecraft resource pack that upgrades the default Elytra with a more refined, vanilla-friendly texture while keeping the original style intact.
Designed for players who want a cleaner and more detailed Elytra without straying from Minecraft’s classic look, this pack improves visuals without affecting gameplay or performance.
![Normal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2381e21602d070eed9b23383f28dd82f5b82662.png)
## Features

* Improved Elytra texture with better detail
* Maintains a clean, vanilla-friendly style
* Seamlessly fits with default Minecraft textures
* Lightweight with no performance impact
* No mods required (resource pack only)

![break and no break](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca0466ff9cf213331d4107259731c21bdf67e089_0.webp)

## Compatibility

* Minecraft Java Edition 1.20+
* Works with most resource packs and shaders
* Designed to match vanilla aesthetics

---
Heavily inspired by [Rethoughted Elytra](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rethoughted-elytra)

Other texture packs used in these pictures: 
[Saturated MC](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/saturated-mc)
